note: DTD panel: sessionStorage cache by tip-height. First open of the panel still runs the full chain scan (Promise.all chunks of 40 RPC calls; was already parallelised). Subsequent re-opens of the panel WITHOUT the chain advancing now render instantly (<100 ms) from sessionStorage instead of repeating the scan. Cache key includes the tip-height so any new block automatically invalidates and triggers a fresh scan. Cap 5 MB to avoid blowing browser quotas. Same pattern as the UNIQUE MINERS panel speedup (v316) but only caches, does not change the scan loop itself (DTD already used Promise.all batches; the bottleneck for re-opens was redoing the whole walk, not the per-batch latency). Meta tag + JSON v key bumped in lockstep per the auto-reload-loop fix procedure.
